step_title: Controller result recall and dedupe diagnosis
summary: Fixed the controller result recall and dedupe boundary so newer step1 evidence can be recovered from the recent results window instead of being swallowed by stale handled keys.
tests: python -m py_compile scripts/remote_codex_architect_loop.py scripts/remote_codex_executor_server.py scripts/remote_codex_common.py,controller recall smoke: recall_remote_result_for_active_step returns new step1 evidence
